title: 10 years of AlphaGo: The turning point for AI | Thore Graepel & Pushmeet Kohli
summary: A Google DeepMind retrospective marking ten years since AlphaGo defeated Lee Sedol at Go in March 2016. The speakers argue AlphaGo was a foundational moment that sparked the modern AI revolution and enabled subsequent breakthroughs in algorithmic discovery and scientific challenges like protein folding.
